title: oxalis microdonta
intro: Oxalis microdonta, also known as the small-flowered wood-sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Oxalis genus and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oxalis microdonta include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried and used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
